name: @ptdl/plugin-field-enhancements
description: Rich field widgets for forms/tables via a bundled RunJS snippet library (icon-in-input, rich association dropdown, select→button group, star rating, progress bar, avatar, tags, formatters) plus no-code Field components: Value tag, Relative date (date/time → distance from today or another column; overdue/due-soon colours, smart units). Full Vietnamese UI. Snippets show up in the RunJS editor picker for the right field context. No-code widgets added incrementally.
